title: AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5912 / 53 OG No. 17, 5580 (September 15, 1957

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1810, June 22, 1957 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representative of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven is hereby amended in the following particulars:

Item (

b

), paragraph twenty-five, Laguna I, section f, section two, is amended to read as follows:

"(b) Linga Barrio School, Calamba Construction ........................... P 2,500.00"

Item 12, subsection y, Laguna I, section three, is amended to read as follows:

"12. Sala Barrio School Building, Cabuyao Construction ................. 3,500.00"

On page 170-A, Appendix A, Item B-362.16, the words under column "Name and Location of Project" shall read as follows:

"B-362.16âDumaguete South Roadâwidening at Lacob-lacob Point, Santa Catalina"

SEC. 2. If any item of appropriation amended by this Act has already been partially expended, the amendment to said item shall refer only to the unexpended balance thereof.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1957.
